rationale: Educ. Code §12.030 governs rescission of home-rule school district charters. It contains no provisions related to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: A home-rule school district charter may be rescinded as provided by this section.
_note: Rule text concerns charter rescission procedure only; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
